name: io.github.kwailapt/agentcard
description: AgentCard v1.0 — framework-neutral identity layer for agent-to-agent (A2A) communication. Declare, resolve, and validate agent identities using the open AgentCard standard. Analogous to HTTP headers for the agent web.

tools.name: agentcard_declare
tools.description: Register an agent's AgentCard identity (JSON conforming to AgentCard v1.0 schema). Stores in session registry.

tools.name: agentcard_resolve
tools.description: Look up a registered agent's AgentCard by name (partial match) or exact 26-char Crockford Base32 ULID.

tools.name: agentcard_validate
tools.description: Validate any JSON string against the AgentCard v1.0 schema. Checks ULID format, semver version, capability ids, Landauer floor pricing.

tools.name: agentcard_list
tools.description: List all AgentCards registered in this session with ids, names, capability counts, and endpoints.

resources.description: The canonical AgentCard v1.0 JSON Schema.
All declared AgentCards in this session as a JSON array.
